underlying_goal: Test and use a GitLab pipeline status checking skill/command to retrieve pipeline summaries, job breakdowns, and root cause analysis from a private GitLab instance
friction_detail: Initial invocation had a typo ('gitlab-piepline-status') and Claude asked too many clarifying questions before the user switched to using the command directly with args.
brief_summary: User repeatedly invoked a GitLab pipeline status skill with different pipelines and knowledge base URLs, and Claude successfully executed the checks and returned structured pipeline summaries each time.
